docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-05-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-05-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. COURT CERTIFIED SPANISH INTERPRETER FANNY SUAREZ PRESENT AND ASSISTS BOTH BOTH PARTIES. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2011 - JUDGMENT.
